bias.description: generates TLC-shaped Arrow batches in-process rather than decoding the public TLC Parquet files
does not build CDF packages, receipts, manifests, contract verdicts, or checkpoint state
uses DuckDB deprecated C Arrow stream scan API to isolate scanner/materialization and rowid viability; not a production destination path
relies on DuckDB hidden rowid verification instead of persisting the current _cdf_row_key payload column

reference.name: duckdb_arrow_stream_scan_ingest
reference.semantic_work: materializes synthetic TLC-shaped Arrow batches into a persistent DuckDB table through DuckDB Arrow stream scan without _cdf_row_key, verifies hidden rowid, and omits CDF source, package, receipt, and checkpoint work
